description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a perimeter of potted plants, creating a lush green border. The structure features a flat roof with a light tan trim and a predominantly white and black facade, accented by large windows and a spacious patio area. The front of the bungalow includes a covered entryway and a tiled terrace, while the sides and rear are more enclosed, with fewer windows and more solid wall space. The landscaping is meticulously arranged, with potted plants forming a dense, uniform hedge around the property. The building's design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and black facade, and surrounded by a dense border of potted plants. Features large windows, a tiled patio, and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tiled patio, and large windows, with potted plants forming a green border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall with minimal windows and the continuous line of potted plants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more enclosed facade with fewer windows and the dense plant border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of black and white wall sections, small windows, and the plant perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
